queries.question: For each preservation society, show me the project types, descriptions and costs.
queries.sql: select preservation_societies.name , projects.type , projects.description , projects.cost from Preservation_Societies_Projects join Projects on Preservation_Societies_Projects.Projects_ID = Projects.ID join Preservation_Societies on Preservation_Societies_Projects.Societies_ID = Preservation_Societies.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/housingmarket/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?description ?cost WHERE {
  ?preservation_societies_projects a :Preservation_Societies_Projects .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?preservation_societies_projects p:hasProjects ?projects .
  ?preservation_societies a :Preservation_Societies .
  ?preservation_societies_projects p:hasPreservation_Societies ?preservation_societies .
  ?preservation_societies p:name ?name .
  ?projects p:Type ?type .
  ?projects p:Description ?description .
  ?projects p:Cost ?cost .
}

queries.question: provide me with the project type and cost that is common for all preservation societies.
queries.sql: SELECT Projects.Type, Projects.Cost  from Preservation_Societies_Projects join Projects on Preservation_Societies_Projects.Projects_ID = Projects.ID join Preservation_Societies on Preservation_Societies_Projects.Societies_ID = Preservation_Societies.ID   GROUP BY Preservation_Societies_Projects.Projects_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Preservation_Societies_Projects.Societies_ID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Preservation_Societies)
